> *Your true spending averaged **$5,716.82 per month** over April–June 2026.*

I counted purchases from both checking and credit cards, while excluding transfers and both sides of credit-card payments so nothing was double-counted.

| Month | True spending |
|---|---:|
| April | $5,587.51 |
| May | $5,259.67 |
| June | $6,303.29 |
| **3-month average** | **$5,716.82** |

June was **$1,043.62 higher than May**, driven largely by increased card spending. April includes a **$3,850 property-tax payment**; because that is a real expense, it remains included even though it may be annual rather than recurring. For routine monthly budgeting, separating annual and irregular expenses would produce a steadier baseline.
